# arxiv-archive

> Full local mirror of arXiv CS/AI/ML papers with PostgreSQL + pgvector. Semantic search, citation graph, HTTP API.

## Overview

arxiv-archive is a Go binary that mirrors arXiv papers locally. It harvests metadata via OAI-PMH, fetches full text from Semantic Scholar, generates embeddings for semantic search, and indexes citation graphs. The HTTP API enables programmatic access to search, similarity, and citation data.

## Capabilities

- Sync ~800K arXiv papers across cs.AI, cs.CL, cs.LG, cs.SE, cs.CV, stat.ML
- Full-text search via PostgreSQL ts_vector
- Semantic similarity search via pgvector (1536-dim embeddings)
- Citation graph traversal (cites / cited-by)
- Incremental daily sync with crash recovery
- HTTP REST API + CLI interface

## API Endpoints

- GET /papers/:id — Paper metadata, text, and ref counts
- GET /papers/search?q=... — Full-text search
- GET /papers/similar/:id — Vector similarity from paper
- GET /papers/similar?q=... — Vector similarity from query text
- GET /papers/:id/refs — Outgoing references
- GET /papers/:id/cited-by — Incoming citations
- GET /papers/recent?cat=...&days=N — Recent papers
- GET /stats — Archive statistics
- POST /sync — Trigger background sync

## CLI Commands

- archive sync — Full pipeline or individual steps
- archive search "query" — Full-text search
- archive similar ID_or_text — Vector similarity
- archive read ID — Print paper
- archive refs ID — Citation graph
- archive serve — HTTP API server
- archive stats — Statistics

## Tech Stack

Go, PostgreSQL, pgvector, OAI-PMH, Semantic Scholar API, llm-router

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/timholm/arxiv-archive
- License: MIT
